candidates.why: This is a COGS-related amortization line, but it appears as a component under the selected parent bucket 'Cost of Operating Revenue' / cost of revenues hierarchy, so adding it separately would risk double counting. The row is also blank in the preview.

This is a COGS-related D&A line, but it appears to be embedded within the selected COGS parent row 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The values support this: 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues' plus 'Material Expenses' equals 'Cost of Operating Revenue', indicating parent-child inclusion rather than a separate same-level expense to add.

variables.notes: Selected COGS row is a parent total. 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues' is a component included within it, and 'Amortization in Cost of Revenues' is blank. No separate COGS D&A should be added.

No explicit SG&A-related depreciation/amortization row is visible above operating profit. The only visible D&A rows relate to cost of revenues and are not relevant to the selected XSGA bucket. Therefore no separate XSGA D&A should be added.
